_comment: Lowest Cost retry-with-decomposition policy. When the Generator stage fails on Ollama, this controls how many times we re-plan smaller and retry on Ollama (NEVER escalating to CLI/API). When the budget exhausts (or diminishing returns triggers early), the wizard appends a stuck-step pause to the session with the configured chip options. See docs/LOWEST_COST_RETRY_POLICY.md for the full spec. Edit + git push + (relaunch OR refreshMchataisourceCache) ships changes with no Swift rebuild.
_decomposeRetryBudgetTunedFrom8To2: Tuned 8 → 4 → 2 across 2026-04-29 iteration. QAFlywheel runs 2026-04-30T00-35-59Z and 00-57-52Z both showed: same model output keeps failing parser/verifier across 4 attempts, model isn't going to magically produce fenced JSON on attempt 4 if it didn't on attempt 1. Drop to 2 — fast surface to user-pause where they can pick 'Try a different approach' (Hail-Mary) or 'Escalate this step to CLI' or 'End the session'. Total grind: ~6 min worst case before chips surface.
_thresholdTunedFrom3: Lowered from 3 → 2 same-class failures triggers diminishing-returns exit. Same logic as budget reduction: if 2 consecutive attempts fail at the same error class, attempt 3 isn't going to magically succeed. Faster surface to user-pause.
_hailMaryComment: When user picks 'Try a different approach' on a stuck-step pause, allow ONE more decomposition cycle with an explicit 'try a fundamentally different strategy' nudge in the planner prompt. After that one cycle, the chip is removed from the next pause (only escalate/skip/end remain).
_lockedProviderComment: The provider used for ALL retry attempts. Even if Ollama becomes briefly unreachable, the policy waits + retries — does NOT escalate to CLI/API silently. Only the user's explicit 'escalate-this-step' chip choice can change the provider for a step.

ollamaUnreachable._comment: Behavior when Ollama daemon stops responding mid-retry. The retry waits (no decomposition cost charged) and re-probes. After N consecutive unreachable polls, the wizard surfaces an inline 'start the daemon' message instead of a stuck-step pause.

stuckStepChips.label: 🔄 Try a different approach
stuckStepChips._note: Hail-Mary: one more decomposition cycle with explicit 'try a fundamentally different strategy' nudge. Suppressed if hailMaryEnabled is false or if a hail-mary already happened for this step.

stuckStepChips.label: ⚡ Escalate this step to CLI
stuckStepChips._note: Routes JUST this step through the CLI dispatch path (Claude Code → Codex → Gemini CLI). Surrounding plan stays Ollama. User-consented; no silent escalation.

stuckStepChips.label: ⏭ Skip this step
stuckStepChips._note: Generator continues with the next step; failed step gets a stub. Suppressed when no completed steps exist (skipping the first step usually means the wizard produced nothing useful).

stuckStepChips.label: 🛑 End the session
stuckStepChips._note: Clean shutdown; partial work is saved. Always available.

_headlessComment: When a tunnel canary or other headless caller hits a stuck-step pause (no UI present to tap a chip), auto-pick this kind. 'end-session' lets QAFlywheel record stuck-step-no-resolution as a clean terminal state.
